{{ uptime ?? 0 }}% {{ incidents === 0 && monitored ? 'All systems normal' : 'Needs attention' }}

{{ formatMoney( calculateTotal( lineItems | activeItems, taxRate, credits ), currencyCode ) }}

CapabilityDecisionSource

{{ [true, false, null, undefined] | json }}

{{ [primaryRegion, backupRegion, account?.region] | compact | join:' · ' }}

{{ chooseRegion(primaryRegion, backupRegion, locale) }}
